prompt: For the '2026 FIFA World Cup Winner' event, rank Spain, France, England, South Korea, New Zealand, and Switzerland by implied probability, 24h volume, bid-ask spread, and exit quality, then show the results as a chart plus a tradability table.
expectedReason: homepage showcase categorical charts need multi-row comparisons
responsePreview:
Based on the data for the **2026 FIFA World Cup Winner** event, here are the metrics and rankings for the requested teams as of May 2, 2026.

### Tradability Table

| Outcome | Implied Probability | 24h Volume | Bid-Ask Spread (%) | Exit Quality |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **France** | 16.45% | $22,813,238.11 | 0.61% | 73.00 |
| **Spain** | 15.25% | $17,949,727.25 | 0.66% | 71.39 |
| **England** | 11.05% | $14,707,389.67 | 0.90% | 66.41 |
| **Switzerland** | 0.95% | $14,228,955.66 | 10.53% | 41.16 |
| **South Korea** | 0.45% | $20,812,930.80 | 22.22% | 39.43 |
| **New Zealand** | 0.25% | $26,915,867.71 | 40.00% | 38.87 |

### Comparative Rankings

*   **Implied Probability**: France > Spain > England > Switzerland > South Korea > New Zealand
*   **24h Volume**: New Zealand > France > South Korea > Spain > England > Switzerland
*   **Bid-Ask Spread (Tightness)**: France > Spain > England > Switzerland > South Korea > New Zealand
*   **Exit Quality**: France > Spain > England > Switzerland > South Korea > New Zealand
